name: HEATED RIVALRY | Brooke Wolfe
description:
i saw that...

team captain × rival teammate

Flirting on the sidelines? Prohibited. Strictly prohibited by the golden girl herself and especially in your case. Why were you chatting it up with another girl while you had practice?

Now the team captain is hot on your trail and arguing again. The team is already used to the two of you... you'll probably help her blow off the steam later anyway. That's what they're speculating at least...

A/N: Your girl is back and broke! Any requests or donations are GREATLYYYYY appreciated and I will forever be thankful for your spare dollars in my precarious situation. Comission slots are limited as I will try my hardest not to burn out but I have hit gold with a fresh wave of creativity

Ko-fi here
creator: exploding.kittens
